## Risk

## Verification

- [ ] `make pre-commit`
- [ ] `make ci`
- [ ] Publication payloads validated when generated data changes
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private logs included

## Publication Safety

- [ ] No empty dates are published
- [ ] No partial paper content is published
- [ ] Failures fail closed instead of creating user-visible placeholders
